title: GD&T (3days)
subtitle: A 3-day HRD Corp-claimable quality workshop for applying GD&T requirements at work.
whyThisMatters: GD&T (3days) helps quality, operations, and process teams translate GD&T into daily routines, evidence, and improvement habits. The session covers use as communication tools, The important information using GD&T system, and b) Control the datum features so participants can support standards, audits, and process discipline with more confidence.
builtFor: Supervisors and process owners involved in compliance work
Employees who support audits, records, or continual improvement
walkAwayWith: Understand the key requirements and workplace expectations behind the topic.
Recognize how process discipline, evidence, and records support compliance.
Apply practical improvement habits to daily operations.
Participate more confidently in implementation, review, or audit activities.

modules.title: The important information using GD&T system

methodologyCaption: Participants connect standards and quality concepts to workplace examples through guided discussion, exercises, and practical review activities.
